queries.query: What is the address of Maharaja Agrasen College?

queries.query: List all departments in Maharaja Agrasen College
queries.ground_truth: Departments include Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Biology, Electronics, Computer Science, Commerce, English, Hindi, Political Science, Economics, History, Business Economics, Economics, Journalism, Physical Education

queries.query: List all undergraduate courses offered by MAC
queries.ground_truth: Courses include B.Sc(H) Electronics, B.Sc.(Physical Science), B.Sc.(G) Mathematics, B.Com (Hons), B.A.(H) Business Economics (BBE), B.A.(H) English, B.A.(H) Journalism, B.A.(H) Political Science, B.A.(H) Hindi

queries.query: List facilities available on campus
queries.ground_truth: library, lab, sports, canteen, computer, seminar room

queries.query: List student societies in MAC
queries.ground_truth: Mac Voice Blog (Journalism), National Service Scheme, NSS, National Cadet Corps, NCC

queries.query: List commerce-related courses at MAC
queries.ground_truth: Commerce-related courses include B.Com (Hons) and B.A.(H) Business Economics (BBE)

queries.query: What is NAAC accreditation of Maharaja Agrasen College?
queries.ground_truth: Maharaja Agrasen College, accredited with an 'A' Grade by NAAC

queries.query: What is B.Com (Hons.) course?
queries.ground_truth: B.Com (Hons.) has been the flagship programme of Delhi University.
